hooks.prompt: A git commit was just made. Run 'git show --stat HEAD' to find which source files changed (ignore test files like *.test.* or *.spec.*). For each changed source file, check whether tests already exist and add or update tests to cover the new or modified code. Project rules: strict TypeScript with no `any` types, one assertion per test unless testing a multistep flow, keep code compartmentalized. Do NOT run git commit — leave the test changes unstaged for the user to review.
hooks.statusMessage: Reviewing committed changes and updating tests...
